title: iCloud Photos
drDigitalIntro: iCloud Photos syncs your photos across all your Apple devices — Mac, iPhone, iPad. When you take a photo on your iPhone, it appears in Photos on your Mac automatically. You get 5GB free; if you need more, subscribe to iCloud+. iCloud also backs up your photos so if you lose your Mac, your photos are safe in the cloud.

playgroundTask.question: With iCloud Photos turned on, what happens when you take a photo on your iPhone?

options.text: It saves only on your iPhone
It automatically appears on all your Apple devices
You have to manually transfer it to your Mac

drDigitalSuccess: iCloud Photos is seamless sync — snap a photo on your phone, it's on your Mac in seconds.
drDigitalHint: iCloud connects all your Apple devices. With Photos enabled, your photo library is one shared library across all of them.
